top_signals.title: New Zealand central bank chief hails growth ‘rebound’
top_signals.summary: RBNZ raises interest rates for first time in 3 years as inflation persists
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump ‘completely committed’ to Nato, Rutte says
top_signals.summary: US president has threatened to remove US troops from Europe and revived calls to take control of Greenland
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany set to become first international site for ATACMS missile production
top_signals.summary: The move addresses a bottleneck, as Lockheed Martin has been winding down ATACMS output at its Camden, Arkansas, site while prioritizing newer missiles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Report under section 231 of the Banking Act 2009 for the period 1 October 2024 to 31 March 2025.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: Report under section 231 of the Banking Act 2009: 1 April 2025 to 30 September 2025
top_signals.summary: Report under section 231 of the Banking Act 2009 for the period 1 April 2025 to 30 September 2025.

top_signals.title: FMD Completes Rolls-Royce Acquisition, Establishes Canadian HQ
top_signals.summary: Fairbanks Morse Defense (FMD), a portfolio company of Arcline Investment Management, finalized its acquisition of the Rolls-Royce Naval Handling facility in Peterborough, Ontario. The closing officially establishes the facility as FMD’s Canadian headquarters…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
